rationale: The one substantive ground-truth item (yJader's inline comment explaining that already_submitted shouldn't gate the unwrap because both submit_initial/submit_update reject list prompts identically) is exactly what X verifies and states explicitly, with correct file/line grounding. Y flags the same orchestrator line but only suggests adding tests/asserts without ever articulating why dropping already_submitted is safe, missing the actual reasoning; Y also proposes an assert(len<=1) that contradicts the deliberate multi-element batching behavior X correctly identifies as intentional. Y's output is also verbatim-duplicated three times, undermining confidence in its process even though individual comments are file/line-grounded and non-fabricated.
